That is well below the 12 million […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> New ‘Ex-Elon’ ETFs let investors track the market while skipping Musk’s companies https://thenextweb.com/news/subversive-ex-elon-etfs-exclude-musk-companies Fri, 10 Jul 2026 20:14:09 +0000 TheNextWeb=d21a7b5f37174ffe301b68180287e4ff An investment firm is offering a way to invest in the broad market without owning Elon Musk’s companies. Both exclude any company “founded, controlled or led by” Musk. The products […] This story continues at The Next Web]]> The first flights of the US air-taxi program carried organs, not passengers https://thenextweb.com/news/beta-evtol-first-flights-us-pilot-program Fri, 10 Jul 2026 20:09:19 +0000 TheNextWeb=3cca989e13465957775c6fbc78f8facb Beta Technologies has completed the first flights in the US government’s electric air-taxi pilot programme. The Amazon-backed company flew the debut missions of the scheme, CNBC reports. The flights did not carry passengers. Instead, they transported manufactured organs for United Therapeutics between airports in Maryland and Virginia, covering about 275 nautical miles.
